exploration_notes: The DOM event dispatch path in Firefox flows through these key files: (1) **Event creation**: `EventDispatcher::CreateEvent` in EventDispatcher.cpp creates DOM Event objects from WidgetEvents based on event class (mouse, keyboard, etc.), and `Event::ConstructorInit` in Event.cpp initializes them. (2) **Event target identification & chain building**: `EventDispatcher::Dispatch` in EventDispatcher.cpp builds the event target chain by calling `EventTargetChainItem::GetEventTargetParent` on each tar
